About

Engineering that leaves the screen and enters the workshop.

I'm a Mechanical & Mechatronics Engineer based in Huraymila, Saudi Arabia, with 5+ years turning SolidWorks models into factory-ready parts. My work spans product design, fiber laser programming, CNC punching and press-brake bending — the full path from concept to finished steel.

Over the past five years I've delivered 16+ product lines for developers and industrial clients including ROSHN, Nadec, Saudi Post and GASCO — balancing design accuracy with real production constraints on the shop floor.
